CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.'s MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant Tesla, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
